67:
That, my friend, is the crux of it. But as you have experienced firsthand, there is more to the sword and shield than meets the eye. Our art is ever evolving, and it falls to us to evolve with it.
...Just to be clear─You <Emphasis>are</Emphasis> <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>, and not <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> twin <If(PlayerParameter(4))>sister<Else/>brother</If>, right?
